name: Human
description: Standard human forces. Most common faction in Beamstrike. Can use all standard equipment, weapons and armour types.

name: SPUG
description: Alien race. Strong close combat fighters.
special: SPUG through smoke/night: firer gets +1 to hit

name: GREY
description: Classic alien grey beings. Poor close combat ability but with advanced technology.
special: Damage modifier: +1 to damage roll when target is Hibevor/Grey
Count Hibevor PA as AD class for damage

name: BUG
description: Insectoid alien species with multiple castes: Runner, Hunter, Terror, Flyer, Cerebral, Queen, Colossus.
movementNotes: See alien figure movement chart. Runners/Terrors: -1 to hit, Hunters/Flyers: -2 to hit.

name: Ferrapur
description: Alien race. Good close combat fighters. Use advanced energy weapons.

name: Centaling
description: Alien race. Excellent close combat fighters.

name: Hibevor
description: Alien race. Poor close combat but uses special firing bonus through smoke/darkness.
special: Count Hibevor PA as AD class for damage purposes

name: Growwlan
description: Alien race. Night vision capability and good close combat fighters.
special: Growwlan firing at night/in dark: +1 bonus to hit

name: Kra'vak
description: Alien race with battle rage ability. Uses gauss weaponry.
special: Enraged: +2 H2H, -1 to damage roll when target, firer gets -1 to hit them
Battle rage: +3 H2H, -2 to damage roll when target

name: Orcoid
description: Alien race. Good close combat and sturdy.

name: Thuntra
description: Massive alien race. Exceptional close combat fighters.

name: Warbird
description: Flying alien race. Exceptional close combat ability.
movementNotes: See alien figure movement chart. Flying capability.
